process.title:
How does the
magic happen
process.step1Body: We start with an introduction call, which helps me understand your needs. We'll discuss your goals, needs and ambitions. If this looks like a great match, we dive into a deeper project spec.
process.step2Body: Building trust together is a priority. We'll stay in touch to ensure transparency and define steps for a successful project launch.
process.step3Body: After gathering project details, we design proposals. For each milestone, I'll seek your approval. We can choose daily compensation or project-based payment.
process.step4Body: After completing your feedback, I'll hand over the final work to you. Afterward, I'll stay in touch to provide quality assurance, discuss potential new projects, or just keep in touch.

work.enumaTitle:
Lasting partnership as
Product & Brand Designer

faq.title: Any further questions?
faq.q1: Do you work exclusively via the collective?
faq.a1: No, as a customer you decide whether to work with the collective, which I am a part, or exclusively with me, depending on your needs and budget.
faq.q2: What services do you offer exactly?
faq.a2: I focus mainly on Product Design & UX UI Design, whether from an existing application/website or from scratch. I'm qualified to help you create impactful visuals, an easy-to-use well-organised design system and integrate your website on Webflow.
faq.q3: How do you bill your services?
faq.a3: I mainly invoice in days and do not accept contracts invoiced in hours. However, depending on your needs and availability, I can invoice on a per-project basis.
faq.q4: Do you work only remotely or can you join our offices?
faq.a4: I usually work 100% remote. As I'm based in France, I can sometimes travel if your office is in the Bordeaux area or in Paris.
faq.a5: Yes, I'm based in Bali, in Indonesia, but I'm used to working with start-ups based in the U.S. and Europe. Nowadays, distance is no longer a problem.

whoiam.bioSuffix: in a variety of markets, including
whoiam.clientsCaption: Over the last few years, I've had the opportunity to work on a wide range of projects with amazing teams.
